title: Tender Jamaican Chicken Wrap
description: Spicy, crisp Jamaican dish featuring rice wine, leaf wrap steam, and a dash of jerk seasoning. Serve warm in a crispy tortilla wrap.
instructions: Combine jerk seasoning, thyme, garlic powder, and cayenne pepper in a small bowl.
In a large resealable plastic bag, combine 2 tablespoons of olive oil and the spice mixture.
Add the chicken to the bag, turning to coat evenly. ,
Cover and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes or up to 2 hours.
Grill the chicken for 5-6 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Let the chicken rest for 5 minutes before slicing.
Warm large flour tortillas according to package instructions.
Slice the grilled chicken into thin strips.
Assemble the wraps by placing chicken on a tortilla, then topping with mango salsa, chopped cilantro, and sliced red onion.
